name: Border Layout
description: Arranges content into north, west, center, east, and south layout regions.

children.description: Border item components to be rendered.

gap.description: Sets row and column gutter size using a density multiplier.

columnGap.description: Sets column gutter size using a density multiplier.

rowGap.description: Sets row gutter size using a density multiplier.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing using a multiplier or CSS margin value.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing using a multiplier or CSS padding value.

aria: Use the polymorphic `as` prop to apply semantic HTML for layout regions.

inside: Top-level app or page layout containers
